license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.inecdbe
title: Extraction Method E (PRP)
author: Faezah Mohd Salleh

steps_raw.instruction: Cut tissue into small pieces.
Add 500 µl Lyse 1, 50 µl Lyse 2 and 10 µl Proteinase K. undetermined, Lyse 2 undetermined, Proteinase K
Incubation in a shaker at 65°C for 12 hours. 12:00:00, Incubation at 65°C
Centrifuge for 10 min. 13000rpm. 00:10:00, Centrifugation
Discard supernatant without disturbing the pellet.
Add 375 µl Lyse 3 undetermined, Lyse 3
Vortex for 20 sec. 00:00:20, Vortex
Leave it for 5 min in the freezer (-20°C). 00:05:00, Freezer
Centrifuge 20 min. 13000rpm. 00:20:00, Centrifugation
Transfer the supernatant to a new tube.
Add 640 µl Isopropanol. undetermined, Isopropanol
Mix by inversion.
Centrifuge for 15 min 13000 rpm. 00:15:00, Centrifugation
Remove the supernatant (don´t touch the pellet).
Add 150 µl Ethanol. undetermined, Ethanol
Centrifuge for 5 min 13000 rpm. 00:05:00, Centrifugation
Remove the Ethanol with a pipette (don´t touch the pellet).
Try the pellet (37°C open lid max 5 min). 00:05:00, Drying
Re-suspend the pellet in 100 µl ddH2O water. undetermined, ddH2O
Prior to library construction, analyze small aliquots of each extract on Nanodrop (Thermo Fischer Scientific, Darmstadt, DE) for estimation of DNA concentration.
